stories.headline: U.S. lifts restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos AI model
stories.blurb: The Trump administration has removed government restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos model, ending a standoff over the cutting-edge AI system. The move allows Anthropic to deploy and commercialize the model without federal oversight that had been imposed on its capabilities.
stories.why_it_matters: Anthropic can now ship its most advanced model without government approval first.
stories.original_headline: U.S. Loosens Restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos A.I. Model

stories.headline: Google capped Meta's Gemini access as AI demand outstrips supply
stories.blurb: Google limited how much of its Gemini model Meta could use, signaling that even tech giants are hitting capacity walls. Computing power for advanced AI is becoming the industry's scarcest resource as companies race to train and deploy larger models.
stories.why_it_matters: When Google rations AI to Meta, smaller players face even tighter squeezes on model access.
stories.original_headline: Google caps Meta’s Gemini use as AI demand strains capacity

stories.headline: Apple's Vision Pro VP just jumped to OpenAI's hardware team
stories.blurb: Paul Meade, the Apple VP who led Vision Pro, is leaving to join OpenAI's hardware division. It's a rare high-level defection from Apple's product org to a company building AI-first devices.
stories.why_it_matters: OpenAI is clearly staffing up to ship actual hardware, not just software demos.
stories.original_headline: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI

stories.headline: Meta relaunched Creator Studio as an AI app that tells you how to grow on Facebook
stories.blurb: Meta brought back its old Creator Studio page manager as a standalone app with AI baked in. The AI Creator Assistant is designed to help creators connect with audiences and get specific advice on growing their Facebook presence.
stories.why_it_matters: Meta is betting AI coaching can keep creators on Facebook instead of losing them to TikTok or YouTube.
stories.original_headline: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app

try_this_prompt.title: The meeting cost calculator
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'm about to schedule a recurring meeting. Tell me: if we cancelled it forever, what specific work would actually not get done? Then calculate the annual cost in salary hours. Finally, give me one alternative structure that keeps the good part and kills the rest.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Before you send that calendar invite for 'weekly sync.'
